title: helictotrichon schellianum
intro: Helictotrichon schellianum, also known as Schell's false brome, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helictotrichon schellianum include its ability to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
